name: HRT_NOTES_
description: This Table is for HCM Notes Functionality.

columns.Name: NOTE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key identifier of a task.

columns.Name: HIDDEN_FLAG
columns.Comments: Feedback Hidden Flag

columns.Name: RECEIVER_ID
columns.Comments: Notes Receiver ID

columns.Name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Kudos/Notes Active Flag

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE ID for SAAS compliance

columns.Name: NOTE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Classification of notes. eg- General Notes/Meeting Notes

columns.Name: NOTE_TEXT
columns.Comments: Stores the actual note information.

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Source Object Type of the object against which the note is created.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Source Object Identifier of the object against which the note is created.

columns.Name: AUTHOR_ID
columns.Comments: Person Identifier of the creator of the note.

columns.Name: VISIBILITY_FLAG
columns.Comments: This will be 'P' for private notes.

columns.Name: NOTE_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Required for display purposes in the UI.

columns.Name: NOTE_CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Required for display purpose in UI

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Context Type of Note

columns.Name: CONTEXT_ID
columns.Comments: Context Identifier of the note.

columns.Name: NOTE_VISIBILITY_CODE
columns.Comments: Specify the visibility of the note.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_NAME_VO
columns.Comments: Specify the VO for retrieving context name.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_TYPE2
columns.Comments: Additional Context Type of Note

columns.Name: CONTEXT_ID2
columns.Comments: Additional Context Identifier of the note.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_NAME_VO2
columns.Comments: Specify the VO for retrieving additional context name.

columns.Name: NOTE_TEXT_AUDIT
columns.Comments: Stores the actual note information for auditing.

columns.Name: CARD_TITLE
columns.Comments: Title of the card that is associated with this note

columns.Name: IMAGE_REFERENCE_URL
columns.Comments: Image reference URL that is associated with this note

columns.Name: REFERENCE_COUNT
columns.Comments: Reference count

columns.Name: NOTE_CODE
columns.Comments: Alternate key or user key that contains a user defined value that can be used to identify a note record

columns.Name: TAG_LIST
columns.Comments: Specify list of person who are tagged for this note

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
